_doc: Builder — Act 3 ally automation. Visual: yellow body + hard-hat + wrench. PR #3.3 ships full AI: scan active ghost zones, withdraw matching resources from the pad's stockpile, walk to the zone, deposit (mutates UnlockZone.progress directly; emits zone:funded when complete). Per the redefined Builder role (PROTOTYPE_STATUS.md §4 spec divergence note 2026-05-07): pulls from the pad, NOT the player's stack. Stats: HP 25, speed 3.5 (slightly faster — courier role), faction ally. Non-combatant.
